revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-1-315

Total amplitude of oscillation (of a periodic quantity)

The difference between the maximum and the minimum value of the quantity during one period.


Note: In the case of sinusoidal oscillation usually called double amplitude.


Reference: I.E.C. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
